title: VayaPin publishes permanent public pins, and its default is path-dependent
summary: The vayapin stage publishes a real, permanent cs.vayapin.com page per business — deleting the campaign does NOT remove the pages. On /lead-search with an omitted workflow the request forces vayapin.enabled=true (publishes); on campaigns it follows what you send; the bare schema default is false. Don't reason about the default — always set workflow.vayapin.enabled explicitly.
